The '''Vrot''' were a small race. A [[Unidentified Vrot|Vrot]] mercenary who worked for [[Soergg Vosadii Bezhin|Soergg]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] was a member of this species.

{{Species-stub}}
